_comment: BRUNO — Deepcore City (gym 4, Fighting) leader intro. A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), reusing Cicada's SAME relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 camera geometry VERBATIM so gym/engage_deepcore_leader still opens the battle from the endBack stage. Structure mirrors leader_intro: pull up over the challenger's shoulder framing Bruno, TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to his face (the two z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close holds mirror starter_reveal's push-in), cross high for a side profile, then drop home. startTitle names him; a Fighting-type effect cue (crit + sweep_attack particles anchored ON the leader via `execute at <uuid>`, so they land on Bruno regardless of camera) plus anvil/knockback/strike sounds sell the Ironbreaker reveal. IN-WORLD TUNING MAY BE NEEDED: air-verify the zoom-keyframe framing and the particle ~1 height at the real Deepcore arena and nudge as needed. endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at 4f016bc8-7b9f-4624-819d-149d93c688d3 run particle minecraft:crit ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at 4f016bc8-7b9f-4624-819d-149d93c688d3 run particle minecraft:sweep_attack ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
